$comment: Single source of truth for the Tempera SDK surface. Every product, audience, scope, environment target, error-normalization rule, and typed operation in the TypeScript, Python, and Rust packages is generated from this file. Edit this file, run `python3 scripts/gen-sdk-surface.py`, and commit the regenerated per-language surface tables together with it. CI fails on drift. See docs/ROLLOUT.md for the endpoint-change rollout process.

issuer.description: The Tempera control plane (auth-hub) is the OAuth 2.1 issuer. Authorization-code + PKCE (S256, public clients), refresh-token rotation, RFC 8707 resource parameter for audience selection, and central API keys (tp_...) that work as bearers at every product.

errorContract.$comment: Every language exposes TemperaApiError with exactly these fields, populated by normalizing the six wire error shapes in the fleet.
errorContract.name: TemperaApiError
normalization: If body.error is an object: code = body.error.code, message = body.error.message, requestId = body.error.request_id (cradle, remi, data-engine; data-engine bodies always carry request_id).
Else if body.error is a string and body.message is present: code = body.error, message = body.message (control plane, palette).
Else if body.error is a string: code = null, message = body.error (tempo).
Else: code = null, message = the HTTP status text.
requestId also falls back to the x-request-id response header when the body carries none (remi echoes it).

controlPlane.name: auth-hub
controlPlane.auth: account bearer token from login/signup (control-plane session); introspectToken requires the introspection secret
controlPlane.description: Tempera control plane: unified accounts, OAuth issuance, workspaces, teams, API keys, billing, usage metering, and the unified MCP gateway.

palette.name: palette
palette.auth: bearer minted for audience palette, central tp_ API key, or product x-palette-api-key header
palette.description: Agent observability: trace and span ingestion, search, datasets, evals, experiments, gates, and human review.

tempo.name: tempo
tempo.auth: bearer minted for audience tempo, central tp_ API key, or the tempod static token
tempo.description: Agent-native browser daemon (tempod): structured observation, batched actions, sessions, runs, and human handoff.

temperaCode.name: Tempera Code
temperaCode.auth: bearer minted for audience tempera-code with model:read/model:invoke, or a central tp_ API key
temperaCode.description: Durable local workflow orchestration and hosted Responses-compatible inference through the Tempera Code gateway.

temperaLlm.name: tempera-llm
temperaLlm.auth: bearer minted for audience tempera-llm with model:read/model:invoke, or a central tp_ API key
temperaLlm.description: OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway every Tempera product calls instead of hitting providers directly; reports LLM cost as model_cost usage events per the billing-credits contract.

cradle.name: cradle
cradle.auth: bearer minted for audience cradle, central tp_ API key, or the cradled static key
cradle.description: Capability sandbox daemon (cradled): synchronous and job-based sandboxed execution plus browser admission control.

remi.name: remi
remi.auth: bearer minted for audience remi, central tp_ API key, or the memory-server static token
remi.description: Temporal memory server: remember, project, query, and maintain an agent memory graph.

dataEngine.name: data-engine
dataEngine.auth: bearer minted for audience data-engine, central tp_ API key, or the data-engine static token
dataEngine.description: Domain-portable label-emergence engine: deterministic ingestion, sandboxed verification in cradle, and RL/eval/SFT dataset emission.

humanData.name: human-data
humanData.auth: bearer minted for audience human-data or central tp_ API key
humanData.description: Browser-agent human review: reviewers inspect provisioned browser-session evidence, record decisions, and return candidate cases to the agent quality loop. Passthrough client only; no typed operations yet.

tempJs.name: temp.js
tempJs.description: Durable JavaScript runtime bridge for Tempera agents. Passthrough client only; no typed operations yet.

tempOS.name: tempOS
tempOS.description: OS/runtime admission, policy, and receipt layer for agents. Passthrough client only; no typed operations yet.

arrha.name: Arrha
arrha.description: Settlement, chain, credits, and indexer layer for agent payments. Passthrough client only; no typed operations yet.

controlPlane.description: Check control-plane liveness; returns {ok: true}.
Fetch OAuth 2.1 authorization-server metadata for the issuer.
Fetch the JSON Web Key Set used to verify control-plane access tokens.
Fetch OAuth protected-resource metadata for one registered audience.
Create a Tempera account (or accept an invite) and receive an account-session token pair.
Log in with email and password and receive an account-session token pair.
Fetch the authenticated user's identity, active workspace, and roles.
Switch the active workspace and receive a token pair scoped to it.
List the organizations the authenticated user belongs to.
Create an organization; the caller becomes its owner.
List projects across every organization the user belongs to.
Create a project in an organization (requires an org admin role).
List environments across every project the user can access.
Create an environment in a project (requires an org admin role).
List team members of the active organization.
Change a team member's role (requires an org admin role; at least one owner must remain).
Remove a team member from the active organization (idempotent).
List invites for the active organization, newest first.
Invite a user to the active organization; the accept URL is returned once.
Cancel a pending invite (idempotent).
List API keys in the active workspace; secrets are never returned.
Mint a workspace API key (tp_...); the secret is returned exactly once. The workspace ids must match the token's workspace.
Rotate an API key's secret; the new secret is returned exactly once.
Revoke an API key (idempotent).
List model profiles in the active project without exposing broker credential references.
Get one project-scoped model profile without exposing its broker credential reference.
Create a project-scoped managed or BYOK model profile using a write-only control-plane broker reference.
Update mutable model-profile metadata or replace its write-only broker reference.
Soft-delete a model profile from the active project.
List the OAuth grants the user has approved in the active workspace.
Revoke an OAuth grant and every refresh token issued under it.
List the user's active account sessions.
Revoke an account session and its tokens immediately (idempotent).
List the connector catalog (MCP clients, editors, and API surfaces).
Fetch one connector's connection status for the active workspace.
List the product catalog with default scopes and setup paths.
Fetch one product's activation status, entitlements, signals, and usage meters.
Fetch the organization's plan, subscription, usage meters, entitlements, invoices, and pricing (requires a billing role).
Create a checkout handoff URL for a plan on the chosen payment rail (requires a billing role).
Fetch the billing-portal URL for the organization (requires a billing role).
Record a usage event against a metered plan limit; requires a token carrying the meter's product scope and returns the updated meter.
List recent audit-log events for the user and active organization (up to 50, newest first).
Introspect a token or tp_ API key server-side; requires the introspection secret and returns {active: false} for anything invalid.

palette.description: Check palette API liveness; returns {ok: true}.
List trace summaries for a tenant with filters and cursor pagination.
Fetch one full trace with all canonical spans; unmasking PII requires the pii:unmask scope and a reason.
Fetch one canonical span by trace and span id.
Fetch a span's recorded input and output values.
Search spans by text query and facet filters.
Ingest one native span; idempotent when an idempotency key is supplied.
Import spans from a named external source payload.
Archive a trace to Parquet and return the archive manifest.
Create a dataset for curating cases from traces.
Promote a trace (or one span of it) into a dataset case.
Snapshot a dataset into an immutable version for evals and experiments.
Mint a palette-scoped API key; the secret is returned exactly once.
Fetch usage totals for a tenant project.

tempo.description: Check tempod readiness, including engine attachment, drain state, and session capacity.
Fetch tempod's OpenAPI document, generated at runtime for this host.
List browser sessions with their state and creation time.
Open a browser session at a URL; driverless sessions skip engine attachment.
Close a browser session and release its engine resources.
Fetch the session's compiled structured observation (ranked, stably-identified elements).
Apply a batch of semantic actions with policy gating; returns the applied diff or a policy decision.
Capture a PNG screenshot of the session, optionally annotated with set-of-marks.
Fetch the session's event window after a sequence number.
Let a human surface take write ownership of the session and receive an adoption lease.
Return write ownership of the session to the agent plane.
Start an agent run against the session with a goal, action budget, and round limit.
List agent runs, optionally filtered to one session.
Fetch one agent run with its state.
Resume an agent run after a human handoff completes.
Grant a pending policy confirmation and receive a single-use grant token.

temperaCode.description: List the entitled Tempera Code hosted model catalog.
Create a non-streaming Responses-compatible inference request through the Tempera Code gateway.

temperaLlm.description: Check tempera-llm gateway liveness; returns {ok: true}.
List the configured model catalog the gateway can route to.
Create a non-streaming OpenAI-compatible chat completion through the tempera-llm gateway.
Create a non-streaming OpenAI Responses-style inference request through the tempera-llm gateway.

cradle.description: Check sandbox-daemon liveness; returns status, version, and uptime.
Fetch the sandbox capability matrix: lanes, engines, limits, and integrations.
Fetch the ecosystem integration contract this daemon implements.
Execute source synchronously in a sandbox lane and return the result with metrics.
Submit an asynchronous sandbox job; returns an operation handle to poll.
Fetch a sandbox job's status and result.
Cancel a queued or running sandbox job (idempotent for already-cancelled jobs).
Fetch the browser sandbox profile levels and suppression modes this daemon offers.
Request admission for a browser session at a sandbox level and receive the guard plan.
Fetch the browser adapter contract, required controls, and conformance profile.

remi.description: Check memory-server readiness, including database health.
Fetch deep store health: schema version, integrity checks, and graph consistency.
Fetch memory-store statistics: ledger events, nodes, and token counts by kind.
Fetch service metrics as JSON, including per-route counters and query-tier latencies.
Fetch service metrics in Prometheus text exposition format for scrape-based monitoring.
List recent service audit events (default 100, maximum 500).

Write one memory into the ledger. Hosted scope is derived from the authenticated principal; provenance is a bounded remi.memory_event_provenance.v1 correlation envelope and the SDK never sends a scope, tenant, project, or environment identifier.
Project pending ledger events into the memory graph and return the projection report.
Run memory management over pending ledger events (same engine pass as project, tracked separately).
Answer a question from principal-scoped memory with evidence, citations, contradictions, and staleness signals.
Retrieve a bounded principal-scoped context pack and immutable receipt for later verified feedback.

Attach a verified outcome to evidence returned by an immutable receipt; remi.memory_feedback.v2 additionally retains a terminal state and idempotency key. Hosted scope is derived from the principal and feedback cannot rewrite memory truth.
Run store maintenance: optimize, checkpoint, and optionally vacuum, repair orphans, and prune audit history.

dataEngine.description: Check data-engine liveness; returns the service status.
List installed versioned domain packs from data-engine's OpenAPI contract.
Get one installed versioned domain-pack manifest.
List immutable domain-pack bindings enabled for a project.
Get one project-enabled, digest-pinned domain binding.
Enable an installed domain pack for a project; pass Idempotency-Key through the operation headers.
Request bounded domain task generation with brokered model-profile and artifact references; the service reports unavailable until that worker and its Cradle lane are qualified.
List installed descriptor-only environment definitions without claiming their execution lane is available.
Get one installed environment descriptor.
Get an asynchronous data-engine operation and its current terminal state.
Request cancellation of a running data-engine operation; pass Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
Delete a completed data-engine operation; pass Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
Register an approved domain-pack source connector; pass Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
List registered source connectors for a project.
Get a source connector and its current ETag.
Patch mutable connector settings; pass If-Match and Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
Delete a connector registration; pass If-Match and Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
Start a bounded connector sync; pass Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
Register a GitHub repository reference; pass Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
List registered project repositories.
Get one repository reference and its current ETag.
Patch mutable repository metadata; pass If-Match and Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
Record a repository snapshot through the authenticated provider boundary; returns an operation.
Request bounded repository task generation; service availability remains explicit until the approved github-evals worker gateway is configured.
Import an immutable worker-produced task set; pass Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
List repository task sets and publication state.
Get one immutable repository task set and its current ETag.
List structurally distinct evaluation and backlog tasks in a task set.
Atomically publish explicitly selected qualified tasks; pass Idempotency-Key through operation headers.
List the MVP use-case templates (data products and pipeline templates) for a project.
Fetch one MVP use-case template with its rubric, modalities, skill tags, and target accuracy.
Ingest one artifact deterministically into the project; returns an async operation handle.
Fetch, parse, and ingest one public HTTP(S) page as a web artifact; returns an async operation handle.
Run a complete MVP use-case pipeline end to end; setting verifier to cradle selects sandboxed wasm verification.
Create a data campaign with a rubric, budget, target accuracy, and skill tags.
List a project's data campaigns with pagination.
List a project's artifacts with filtering, ordering, and cursor pagination.
Fetch one artifact, expanded to the requested view (BASIC or FULL).
List the labels attached to one artifact.
Create an asynchronous labeling job over a set of artifacts; returns an operation handle to poll.
Fetch one labeling job with its state and progress.
List the deterministic label results a job produced.
List the human residual review tasks queued for experts.
Fetch data-engine usage and quality metrics for a project.
Fetch public-site and ecosystem readiness signals for a project.
Emit an eval dataset bundle from verified artifacts; returns an async operation handle.
Fetch one emitted product bundle with its status and manifest URL.
Request an environment run; availability remains explicit until its qualified execution lane is enabled.
Patch an artifact when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Archive an artifact through the documented data-engine lifecycle endpoint.
Purge an archived artifact through the documented data-engine lifecycle endpoint.
Apply due artifact retention policies through the REST-only lifecycle endpoint.
List labeling jobs when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Cancel a labeling job through the documented data-engine lifecycle endpoint.
Create an artifact label when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
List artifact labels when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Get one artifact label when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Patch an artifact label when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Create a verifier when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
List verifiers when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Get one verifier when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Patch a verifier when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Run a verifier when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Create an evaluation definition when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
List evaluation definitions when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Get one evaluation definition when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Run an evaluation definition when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
List evaluation runs when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Get one evaluation run when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
List emitted data products when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Emit a generic data product when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Emit an RLVR product when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Emit a preference product when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.
Emit an SFT product when the documented data-engine implementation is enabled.

mcpGateway.description: Unified MCP gateway at ${issuer}/mcp: stateless streamable-HTTP JSON-RPC 2.0, audience tempera-mcp with scope mcp:invoke. The model-facing surface is fixed to ten tempera_* fabric verbs; product capabilities are opaque, policy-filtered cards discovered with tempera_search, inspected with tempera_describe, and executed through tempera_invoke or tempera_prepare/tempera_commit. Per-call product execution is metered.

methods.description: Open an MCP session and fetch server capabilities and instructions.
List the fixed ten-verb Tempera capability-fabric surface; product cards never appear as flat product tool names.

Call a fixed fabric verb. Discover product cards with tempera_search, inspect a card with tempera_describe, then invoke its opaque capability reference through tempera_invoke or tempera_prepare/tempera_commit.
Fetch the caller's identity, workspace, and scopes as seen by the gateway.
Fetch gateway upstream health for every connected product MCP server.
